name: Barcardi Rum Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease and flour two 9-inch layer cake pans.
Combine the chocolate cake mix, chocolate instant pudding, eggs, Barcardi dark rum, cold water, oil, and slivered almonds or nuts in a large bowl. Blend well using a medium speed mixer for 2 minutes.
Turn batter into prepared pans. Bake for 30 minutes or until done (do not underbake). Cool in pans for 10 minutes. Remove from pans and finish cooling on racks.
Split layers horizontally and spread 1 cup filling between each layer and over the top of the cake. Stack the cake. Keep chilled. Serve cold. Optional: Garnish with chocolate curls.
Filling:
Combine milk, Barcardi dark rum, chocolate instant pudding mix, and Dream Whip topping mix in a deep narrow-bottom bowl. Blend well at high speed for 4 minutes until light and fluffy. Makes 4 cups.
